title: callipteris chimborazensis
intro: Callipteris chimborazensis is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Ecuador. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Callipteris chimborazensis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically prepared by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
